title: Frequency Room — Independent Podcast Network
one_liner: A dynamic independent podcast network website with bold dark-mode UI, neon gradient accents, animated waveform motifs, show landing pages, episode archives with transcripts, host bios, advertiser/partnership page, live tour dates, a member-supported club tier, and a global persistent audio player.
site_goal: Make Frequency Room feel like a high-design listening lounge for night owls — a glossy magenta-lit broadcast booth where each show feels like its own intimate channel, the episode archive reads like a deep crate of liner-noted records, and the Inner Circle membership tier feels like getting handed an after-hours key.
motif: Concentric tuner-dial waveform rings, hairline lime dividers, soft magenta neon halos around portraits and primary CTAs

sections: Sticky show identity rail with subscribe chips
Long-form transcript with speaker drop-caps and timestamp gutter
Atmospheric hero with concentric ring loop

content_model: Channel / Show (channel number, accent color, hosts, cadence, seasons)
Season (number, run dates, episode count, art)
Episode (audio, chapters, transcript, guests, mentioned links, mailbag)
Voice / Host (portrait, bio, timeline, shows, self-selected episodes)
Live broadcast (venue, datetime, supporting shows, simulcast flag)
interactions: Global persistent vertical mini-player rail (right edge desktop, bottom-docked mobile)
Animated concentric-ring waveform on hero and episode artwork
Animated equaliser bars in the mini-player
Filter chips with grouped single-active behavior (channels, archive, voices, live)
Season tabs on the show channel page
Random episode lucky-dip with curated picks
Archive search live-filters search rows by query
Calendar pin hover reveals event detail tooltip
Animated counters on the partner page
FAQ accordion on the Inner Circle page
Typed-effect manifesto opening on the About page
Gated feed preview with blur + unlock CTA

implementation.stack: vanilla HTML, single shared stylesheet, single small JS file
implementation.image_strategy: All visuals are generated with CSS gradients, SVG concentric rings and CSS-drawn silhouettes — no binary image assets to download. Per-show accent colors set inline as --accent custom properties so the same component reflows across all channels.
implementation.responsive: Single breakpoint cascade at 1100 / 960 / 880 / 760 / 700 / 640. Right-edge mini-player rail collapses to a bottom-docked bar under 960px. Show channel sticky rail and archive facets reflow to top-stacked blocks.
